prompt: Create a smart home technology showcase with sleek glass interfaces, IoT device connectivity diagrams, ambient lighting controls, energy consumption charts, and voice command demonstrations
prompt_refined: A futuristic smart home dashboard screenshot, featuring sleek, transparent glass interfaces with a dark, minimalist background. In the center, a detailed IoT device connectivity diagram visually links various smart devices with glowing data lines. To the left, an ambient lighting controls module displays a color palette and intensity sliders. On the right, an energy consumption chart presents real-time power usage as a dynamic line graph. At the bottom, a subtle voice command demonstration is active, showing a microphone icon and a processed command text.
objects: Detailed IoT device connectivity diagram in the center
Ambient lighting controls module on the left
Energy consumption chart on the right
Voice command demonstration at the bottom
